name: Toasted Pecan Scones
recipeIngredient: 2 sticks cold, unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, process the flour, baking powder, sugar, and butter until the mixture just resembles coarse meal.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk. Add this mixture to the processor and blend the dough, pulsing the motor, until it is just combined.
3. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead in the pecans.
4. Roll or pat the dough into rounds that are 1/2 inch thick using a 2-inch cutter.
5. Cut out the rounds and transfer them to a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake the rounds in the middle of a preheated 425°F oven for 14 minutes, or until they are pale golden. Makes 30 scones.
